title: N占폾st ce pas qu占퐄l est doux
content:
혻혻혻혻Is it not pleasant, now we are tired,
혻혻혻혻and tarnished, like other men, to search for those fires
혻혻혻혻in the furthest East, where, again, we might see
혻혻혻혻morning占퐏 new dawn, and, in mad history,
혻혻혻혻hear the echoes, that vanish behind us, the sighs
혻혻혻혻of the young loves, God gives, at the start of our lives?
meaning:
"N占폾st ce pas qu占퐄l est doux" is a quintessential example of Charles Baudelaire's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
